name: Direct Sanctions Exposure (Hop 1)
description: Freeze deposit if direct inflow from Sanctions, Terrorism Financing, or Illicit Markets. Direct contact with sanctioned entities requires immediate action per MAS PSN02.
reference: MAS PSN02 Section 13 — Zero tolerance for sanctioned fund sources

name: Near-Distance Darknet/Ransomware (Hop 2-3)
description: Flag deposit if near-distance inflow from Darknet Markets or Ransomware within 2-3 hops.
reference: MAS PSN02 Section 13.4 — Enhanced monitoring for indirect exposure

name: Withdrawal to Sanctioned Entity
description: Block withdrawal if destination address is directly tagged as Sanctions or Terrorism Financing.
reference: MAS PSN02 Section 13.1 — Prohibition on transactions with designated entities

name: Mixing Service Exposure
description: Flag for enhanced due diligence if address has exposure to mixing/tumbling services within 3 hops.
reference: MAS PSN02 Section 6.2 — Enhanced CDD for obfuscation indicators
